evals.prompt: Erstelle Intro und Outro Videos für meine Vorlesung: /Users/christiankraus/Documents/040_Polynomials.qmd
evals.expected_output: Two spoken-word scripts (intro + outro), each 110-130 words, in German, shown to user before HeyGen submission. Intro has a hook-first opening (no forbidden phrases). Outro focuses on transfer/meaning, not summary.

assertions.name: intro_word_count_in_range
assertions.description: Intro script has between 110 and 130 words

assertions.name: outro_word_count_in_range
assertions.description: Outro script has between 110 and 130 words

assertions.name: intro_no_forbidden_openers
assertions.description: Intro script does NOT start with any of: 'Herzlich willkommen', 'In dieser Vorlesung', 'Heute werden wir', 'Welcome', 'In this lecture'

assertions.name: outro_no_summary_opener
assertions.description: Outro does NOT contain summary openers like 'Wir haben heute gelernt', 'As we have seen', 'In this chapter we'

assertions.name: correct_format_headers
assertions.description: Output contains the required header format: '--- INTRO SCRIPT (word count:' and '--- OUTRO SCRIPT'

assertions.name: user_confirmation_asked
assertions.description: Output asks the user to confirm or adjust scripts before proceeding to HeyGen

assertions.name: scripts_content_specific
assertions.description: Scripts reference polynomials, Horner's method, or other specific content from the QMD — not generic filler

evals.prompt: add video bookends to my Quarto lecture at /Users/christiankraus/Documents/040_Polynomials.qmd
evals.expected_output: Two spoken-word scripts (intro + outro), each 110-130 words, shown to user before HeyGen submission. Correct slug derived from filename (040_Polynomials). Output directory assets/videos/ mentioned.

assertions.name: intro_word_count_in_range
assertions.description: Intro script has between 110 and 130 words

assertions.name: outro_word_count_in_range
assertions.description: Outro script has between 110 and 130 words

assertions.name: intro_no_forbidden_openers
assertions.description: Intro script does NOT start with any of: 'Herzlich willkommen', 'In dieser Vorlesung', 'Heute werden wir', 'Welcome', 'In this lecture'

assertions.name: outro_no_summary_opener
assertions.description: Outro does NOT contain summary openers like 'Wir haben heute gelernt', 'As we have seen', 'In this chapter we'

assertions.name: correct_format_headers
assertions.description: Output contains the required header format: '--- INTRO SCRIPT (word count:' and '--- OUTRO SCRIPT'

assertions.name: user_confirmation_asked
assertions.description: Output asks the user to confirm or adjust scripts before proceeding to HeyGen

assertions.name: slug_correct
assertions.description: Output mentions the slug '040_Polynomials' and/or the output path 'assets/videos/'
